mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user_profile_audit WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND audit_type = #{auditType} AND status = 0 ORDER BY apply_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM sys_user_profile_audit WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND audit_type = #{auditType} AND status = 1 ORDER BY audit_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM sys_user_profile_audit WHERE apply_ip = #{applyIp} AND audit_type = #{auditType} AND status = 1 ORDER BY audit_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM sys_user_profile_audit WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY apply_time DESC
